UpdateSourceArgs: -c "if [[ -d \"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix/drive_c\" ]]; then echo \"Wine prefix already exists. Skipping.\"; exit 0; fi; echo \"Initialising Wine prefix...\"; Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1024x768x16 &>/dev/null & XVFB_PID=$!; sleep 1; DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix\" HOME=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}\" /opt/wine-stable/bin/wineboot --init 2>&1; kill $XVFB_PID 2>/dev/null; echo \"Wine prefix initialised.\"; exit 0"

-c "CFG=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}conf/initial_config_win.cfg\"; if [[ -f \"$CFG\" ]]; then sed -i 's/set render_system \"dx12\"/set render_system \"dx11\"/' \"$CFG\" && echo \"Set render_system to dx11\"; else echo \"Config file not found: $CFG\"; fi"
